message:
feat(core): add kernel/hardware tail-latency controller (ft-2p9cb.3.5.1)

SyscallStrategy, WakeupSource, AffinityHint, TailLatencyController
with wakeup tracking, syscall batching, p99 estimation, budget
violation detection, and 21 unit tests.
